Name: Description
Computer Skills for Kids: Explore the real digital skills kids use every day: AI tools, password safety, organizing files, making media, and publishing their work on the web.

Computer Skills for Kids: Any

Name: Title
Computer Skills for Kids: Description

Name: Chat with AI
Computer Skills for Kids: Set up your browser to open AI tools automatically and learn to ask clear questions.

Name: Email Basics
Computer Skills for Kids: Create a Gmail account, add family contacts, and email a parent.

Name: Password Management with Bitwarden
Computer Skills for Kids: Store your existing Gmail password in Bitwarden and learn why every password must be different.

Name: Web Browsing
Computer Skills for Kids: Customize your browser with bookmarks for school tools and educational sites.

Name: Scheduling
Computer Skills for Kids: Learn to sync calendars and manage shared events.

Name: Search Engines
Computer Skills for Kids: Bookmark search engines and practice finding reliable kid-friendly sources.

Name: Note Taking
Computer Skills for Kids: Install and use Obsidian for organized note taking.

Name: Word Processing
Computer Skills for Kids: Create documents in Google Docs and Apache OpenOffice.

Name: Spreadsheets
Computer Skills for Kids: Build spreadsheets in Google Sheets and Apache OpenOffice.

Name: Presentation Software
Computer Skills for Kids: Create presentations in Google Slides and Apache OpenOffice.

Name: Instant Messaging
Computer Skills for Kids: Use Gmail chat for quick messages and understand when to use chat vs email.

Name: File Types
Computer Skills for Kids: Learn the purpose of common file extensions across documents, images, audio, and video.

Name: File Storage
Computer Skills for Kids: Organize files into logical folders and subfolders.

Name: Basic Graphic Design
Computer Skills for Kids: Design a simple card using Canva.

Name: Image Manipulation
Computer Skills for Kids: Take a screenshot and crop it to a 9:16 ratio.

Name: Video Editing
Computer Skills for Kids: Record a screencast and edit it into a short video.

Name: Software Installation
Computer Skills for Kids: Install Steam and a free game while paying attention to install location and operating system.

Name: Web Publishing
Computer Skills for Kids: Create a blog, write your first post with a photo, and share the link.

Name: File Manipulation with AI
Computer Skills for Kids: Set up Hermes with the free Nous Research tier and use it to edit a file.
